最终证据摘要: Top1 is neutral aromatic (0.80) and top2 is TICT (0.11). The latest evidence does not materially strengthen or weaken the current top1 scientifically; it leaves neutral aromatic unresolved only in the narrow closure sense because the microscopic task again failed for registry reasons. The top2 challenger TICT is likewise not strengthened, because no positive CT-style or twisted-state observables were produced. An additional candidate, unknown, rises slightly only as operational residual uncertainty from incomplete internal closure, while ICT and ESIPT remain structurally disfavored. No still-credible additional hypothesis remains in coverage debt, so the case legitimately remains in pairwise contraction rather than portfolio screening. The key remaining discriminator is successful execution of a supported baseline internal S0/S1 microscopic route for the neutral aromatic versus TICT pair. The best next action is microscopic, because verifier supplementation is already sufficient and high-information, while the active bottleneck is an internal execution-specification repair.
